name: Crockpot Chile Stew
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Can Cream of Mushroom Soup or Cream of Chicken Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the whole chicken and water in the crockpot to cover.
2. Cook for about 4 hours, until the chicken is tender.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (cream of mushroom or chicken soup, corn tortillas, garlic salt, chicken gravy mix, chopped green chile) to the pot.
4. Cook for an additional half hour, until the tortillas are tender and fully cooked through.
5. Serve over rice. Makes 5 - 6 servings.
Note: For safety, ensure the crockpot is turned off when finished cooking.
